text.message: I need that spot. Unless black confirms we are not racing I need to block his brick
Black stop chasing that spot we need to work against
Guys don’t focus in on me when I’m not that much in the lead
I don’t get road and behind in army
But what has that got to do with the brick I needed?
Just rob me like u have been
Well, forgive me for being skeptical
Blue not using devs is a sign
There’s a reason I’m blocking you and not red
